# Genesis Brand — single source (v1.0 FROZEN)

| File | Use |
|------|-----|
| `genesis-mark-master.svg` | Full mark — 32px+ |
| `genesis-mark-favicon.svg` | Compact — 16-24px |
| `Genesis_Brand_v1_FROZEN.md` | Audit + Brand Law |
| `Genesis_Brand_Guidelines_v1.md` | Usage rules |

```bash
pip install -r scripts/requirements-brand.txt
python scripts/generate_brand_assets.py
```

Output includes `generated/audit/orbit-stack-size-audit.png` — visual size check.

**Do not edit PNG/ICO manually.**
